name: Omkareshwar
shortDescription: Pair Mahakal with another Jyotirlinga beside the Narmada.
longDescription: Omkareshwar is a meaningful spiritual extension from Ujjain or Indore. Keep a full day and avoid stacking too many temple stops for families or elderly visitors.
idealDuration: Full day or one overnight stay.

name: Maheshwar
shortDescription: Narmada ghats, Ahilya Fort and celebrated Maheshwari handloom traditions.
longDescription: Maheshwar balances heritage, spirituality and a slower riverside pace. It combines naturally with Indore or Omkareshwar when the itinerary has enough buffer.
idealDuration: Full day or one overnight stay.

name: Mandu
shortDescription: A hilltop heritage landscape of palaces, pavilions and monsoon views.
longDescription: Mandu is best explored with a vehicle and an unhurried day. Walking surfaces and spread-out monuments may require a selective route for elderly travelers.
idealDuration: One full day from Indore or an overnight stay.

name: Sanchi
shortDescription: A UNESCO-listed Buddhist heritage site best planned from Bhopal.
longDescription: Sanchi is a rewarding extension for travelers interested in Indian history and Buddhist heritage. Combine it with Bhopal rather than attempting a rushed Ujjain day trip.
idealDuration: Half to full day from Bhopal.
